name: Annihilation's Approach
explicitMods: Grants Level 20 Approaching Flames Skill
68% increased Armour and Evasion
30% increased Movement Speed
Cannot be Chilled
Cannot be Frozen
Take 6000 Fire Damage per Second while Flame-Touched
Gain Adrenaline when you become Flame-Touched
Lose Adrenaline when you cease to be Flame-Touched
flavourText: Pray that the flames find fascination,
for the true end follows when the great eye closes.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Unleash a beam of fire that burns enemies it touches. Remaining in the beam raises the burning, adding a portion of the beam's damage in stages. Inflicts Fire Exposure at maximum stages. Enemies who leave the beam continue to burn for a duration. Increasing cast speed also increases the rate at which the beam turns.
explicitMods: Deals 780.7 Base Fire Damage per second
Base duration is 1.50 seconds
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
Burning Debuff can have a maximum of 8 stages
Additional Debuff stages add 80% of Damage
Fire Exposure applies -30% to Fire Resistance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any channelling skill, protecting you from damage while you channel it. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 29% more Damage
